# AI Income Systems Lab

> A course and toolkit teaching you to combine ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Lovable, and n8n to build digital products, sales funnels, automations, and AI agents you can actually sell.

AI Income Systems Lab is a one-time-purchase learning platform with three tiers (Starter $29, Builder $79, Pro $149). It pairs an 11-module curriculum with interactive AI builders that turn ideas into ship-ready product plans, funnel plans, and agent specs.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the system, tools covered, what you build, curriculum, and pricing.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Starter, Builder, and Pro tiers with feature comparison and tier-specific upgrade rationale.

## Optional

- [Sign up](/signup): Create an account.
- [Log in](/login): Sign in to an existing account.
